pi_items.source: setup_task.sh SQL queries and export_result.sh target check
FDSN StationXML dataset and IRIS database checks
verifier.py requiring exact match of 50.0 (despite real elevation being 110.0)
export_result.sh OUTPUT_XML path and verifier.py xml_file path check
export_result.sh OUTPUT_TXT path and verifier.py txt_file path check

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real GEOFON FDSN StationXML data. The station GE.BKB is located in Balikpapan, Kalimantan, not Biak, Papua as claimed in the task description. Its real-world elevation is 110.0 meters. However, the setup_task.sh script synthetically corrupts the MariaDB database to set GE.BKB's elevation to 132.0. The verifier.py strictly enforces setting this elevation to a synthetic expected value of 50.0, and expects the export of a corrected SCML inventory to /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/inventory/corrected_inventory.xml along with a text report at /home/ga/station_correction_report.txt containing both the old and new elevations.
